name: Grilled Green Bean & Eggplant Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice eggplants into rounds 1/4 inch thick.
2. Toss the sliced eggplants with green beans in balsamic vinegar.
3. Grill for 8 to 10 minutes, turning frequently.
4. In a large salad bowl, toss together julienned bell peppers, mixed greens, minced red onion, olive oil, lemon juice, and 2 tablespoons of balsamic vinegar.
5. Add salt and pepper.
6. Arrange the grilled vegetables on top of the salad mix.
7. Serve immediately.
